title: Ubeac
description: IoT platform for unified building automation and control systems.

content.overview: Ubeac provides IoT solutions for smart building management and automation.
content.challenge: They needed a scalable platform to connect and manage various IoT devices across multiple buildings.
content.solution: We developed a cloud-based IoT platform with real-time device monitoring, automation rules, and comprehensive analytics.
content.results: The platform has connected 50,000+ IoT devices, resulting in 30% energy savings for clients and real-time monitoring and alerts.
